codeReview.summary: I reviewed the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, commit `9aca440`, the prior failing reviews for `editor-topbar-redesign` and `editor-workspace-redesign`, and the resulting CSS/token changes. The previously flagged hardcoded literals in the Go Live CTA, file crest selectors, and editor/preview panel surfaces are now replaced with token-backed `var(...)`/`color-mix(...)` references in `src/index.css` (`.gp-btn-live` around line 517, `.gp-filecrest*` around line 2014, `.gp-frame--editor` around line 2242, `.gp-frame--preview` around line 2279). The added theme tokens at `src/index.css:35-59` and matching manifest/test updates in `src/ui/tokens.ts` / `src/ui/tokens.test.ts` support those replacements. I did not find a remaining blocking issue related to the original CSS-token failures.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `frontend-redesign` procedure still appears stricter than actual accepted practice for token-only CSS fixes. This worker ran a green baseline before invoking `frontend-redesign`, never invoked `frontend-design`, and still reported `followedProcedure: true`, which suggests the skill guidance and handoff rubric remain out of sync.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\skills\frontend-redesign\SKILL.md:21 requires invoking `frontend-design` at the start, and lines 41-45 require a RED-first failing frontend test. summary: Pass. This fix resolves the prior blocking scrutiny findings: the reviewed editor CTA, file crest, and workspace surface CSS now use token-backed variables instead of hardcoded rgba/hex literals, and no blocking issue remains in those scoped areas.
